changes.description: Typo in known_bugs
MarketPrices table and category layout now display consistently across Gems, Engravings, Honing, and Additional Honing
Gems tab now loads manual gem entries and merges gem pricing into the market price view
Gem icon loading now falls back to alternate file extensions and a default gem image asset when missing
Market favorite command wiring corrected and backend favorite field persisted properly
Progression Planner tab now shows an in-progress placeholder and global character dropdown across all rosters
Character scraper/loadout parsing type conversions corrected to avoid f64/i64 mismatches
Dashboard UI updated for clearer weekly gold progress
Character card UI now shows raid completion mismatches between planned tasks and LOA log activity
To Do tab now keeps the header and first column sticky for easier navigation
Settings tab tracking and raids sections now use sticky headers for better usability
Display order now uses integer sorting logic instead of string ordering
Tracking tab received a new toggle-all function
Tasks not tracked by any character now still appear in the To Do tab
Progression Planner tab with market data infrastructure
Market data: Engravings (43 items), Honing Materials (36 items), Additional Honing Materials (21 items) with live prices from LOA Buddy API
Gems category (40 items): T3/T4 Damage & Cooldown Lv.1-10 with manual price input
Price history charts: click any item to view 30-day min/max/avg price graph with 7d/14d/30d toggle
Manual price override system with visual badge and fallback to API prices
Roster scraper failing for rosters with characters that have combat power below 1.0 (e.g. Rexlul)
Roster scraper now detects Cloudflare blocks and retries up to 3 times with clear error message
Reduced post-scrape delays from ~10s to ~1s
